title: Food Action Six Panel Texture Collage AI
sourceTitle: Food Action Six Panel Texture Collage AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-detailed 3:4 food-action photography collage with six close-up panels featuring cheese tteokbokki, scallion pancake, soup dumpling, mochi, custard taiyaki, matcha lava cake. Subject: Each panel shows two realistic hands pulling each item apart at peak texture moment interacting with one food from cheese tteokbokki, scallion pancake, soup dumpling, mochi, custard taiyaki, matcha lava cake at the exact moment the texture stretches, drips, breaks, tears, or separates. Scene: Warm cinematic bakery and oven-light environment with realistic steam, falling crumbs, glossy highlights, shallow depth of field, and appetizing close macro detail. Composition: 3:4 six close-up panels, shallow depth, rich golden highlights; Signature Elements: cheese tteokbokki, scallion pancake, soup dumpling, mochi, custard taiyaki, matcha lava cake, two realistic hands pulling each item apart at peak texture moment, 3:4 six close-up panels, shallow depth, rich golden highlights, six-panel grid, peak texture stretch, steam, crumbs, glossy highlights, warm bakery light, and photorealistic macro food action. Style: Photorealistic high-resolution food-action photography, cinematic bakery warmth, tactile texture emphasis, rich golden light, macro editorial collage, and appetizing commercial detail. Color Palette: Golden oven light, warm pastry browns, creamy whites, glossy sauces, cheese yellows, chocolate or matcha accents, and natural hand skin tones. Lighting: Rich warm side light, oven glow, shallow highlights on melting or stretching textures, steam haze, and soft background falloff. Camera: Six macro close-up panels with shallow depth of field, crisp texture at the action point, and realistic hand scale. Materials: Elastic cheese, crisp crust, soft dough, glossy filling, crumbs, steam, sauce, powdered sugar or glaze, and realistic fingertips pulling or breaking the food. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
